text: Hello. Hi, this is Jennifer with U.S. Medical Supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. You did. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without fricking your finger. Do you have diabetes? No, I don't. That's good. Take care now.
